classes.reasoning: This is a curriculum vitae (CV) for Dr. Elena Conti, a medical oncologist. While the CV mentions participation in clinical trials (BIORCE-ONC-2023-001, ORCHARD, MARIPOSA-2, PAPILLON), the document itself is a personal professional resume, not a trial master file document or any regulated clinical trial artifact. CVs are sometimes stored in eTMF as investigator qualification documentation, but the document itself is not a trial-specific document and does not serve a direct trial function.

summary: This is a curriculum vitae for Dr. Elena Conti, MD, PhD, an Associate Professor of Medical Oncology at Istituto Nazionale dei Tumori in Milano, Italy. The CV details her educational background, clinical research activities as a principal investigator on several oncology trials, publications, and financial disclosures. While it mentions trial participation, it is not itself a clinical trial document.
content:
CURRICULUM VITAE

================================================================================
PERSONAL DETAILS
================================================================================

Name:           Elena Conti, MD, PhD
Title:          Associate Professor of Medical Oncology
Institution:    Istituto Nazionale dei Tumori, Milano, Italy
Department:     Thoracic Tumours Unit
Email:          e.conti@istitutotumori.mi.it
Date of birth:  14 April 1978
Medical Licence: Ordine dei Medici, Provincia di Milano #38721

================================================================================
EDUCATION
================================================================================

2008  PhD, Molecular Oncology, Università degli Studi di Milano
      Thesis: "Mechanisms of acquired resistance to EGFR inhibitors in NSCLC"
2004  MD (Laurea in Medicina e Chirurgia), summa cum laude, Milano

================================================================================
POSTGRADUATE TRAINING
================================================================================

2005-2008  Residency, Medical Oncology, Istituto Nazionale dei Tumori
2009-2010  Research Fellowship, Memorial Sloan Kettering Cancer Center, New York
           Laboratory of Dr. William Pao (Thoracic Oncology)

================================================================================
CURRENT POSITION
================================================================================

2018-present  Associate Professor, Università degli Studi di Milano /
              Istituto Nazionale dei Tumori
2014-present  Senior Consultant, Thoracic Tumours Unit, INT Milano

================================================================================
CLINICAL RESEARCH
================================================================================

PRINCIPAL INVESTIGATOR (selected):

  BIORCE-ONC-2023-001   Biorce Therapeutics   2023-ongoing
    Phase II, BRC-471, EGFR-mutant NSCLC post-osimertinib
    Site: IT-01 | Enrolled: 9 patients (Dec 2023)

  ORCHARD (BioNTech/AstraZeneca)              2021-2023
    Phase II platform trial, 2nd-line NSCLC | Enrolled: 14 patients

  MARIPOSA-2 (Janssen/AstraZeneca)            2022-2023
    Phase III, amivantamab + lazertinib | Enrolled: 11 patients

  PAPILLON (Janssen)                          2020-2022
    Phase III, amivantamab + chemo, EGFR exon 20 | Enrolled: 8 patients

GCP TRAINING: ICH E6(R2) -- last completed March 2023
              EU CTR 536/2014 training -- completed June 2022

================================================================================
SELECTED PUBLICATIONS (last 5 years)
================================================================================

1. Conti E et al. Real-world outcomes of osimertinib in EGFR-mutant NSCLC:
   Italian cohort. Lung Cancer. 2023;178:32-41. IF: 5.3

2. Conti E, Marchetti F et al. HER2 amplification as resistance mechanism
   to osimertinib. ESMO Open. 2022;7(4):100548. IF: 7.1

3. Conti E et al. Liquid biopsy for EGFR monitoring during osimertinib.
   Journal of Thoracic Oncology. 2021;16(8):1394-1403. IF: 20.4

Total publications: 67 | H-index: 22 | Citations: 1,847

================================================================================
FINANCIAL DISCLOSURES (last 3 years)
================================================================================

Advisory boards / Honoraria:
  AstraZeneca, Janssen, Roche, MSD, BMS, Biorce Therapeutics

Research grants (institutional):
  AstraZeneca (ADAURA sub-study), Janssen (PAPILLON translational)

Stocks / equity: None

Signature: _______________________  Date: January 2024
================================================================================
